name: Gateway Notify
description: Hook-based gateway startup notification skill for OpenClaw. Sends multi-channel alerts (iMessage, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord) when your gateway restarts — so you know without having to watch it manually. Bilingual docs (EN + ZH).
review: Gateway Notify solves a specific, real problem for OpenClaw users: knowing when your gateway restarts without having to monitor it manually. The implementation is refreshingly clean — input validation in the setup script prevents obvious injection issues, and the multi-channel approach via the OpenClaw message API is idiomatic. Documentation is bilingual (EN + ZH) which is a bonus. The main weakness is that it's brand-new with limited production track record.

rocket_findings.note: ClawHub SPA — metadata extracted from issue review
